body:
Title: CRA 2025 Federal Other Refundable Credits.

Sources:
- https://www.canada.ca/en/revenue-agency/services/tax/individuals/topics/about-your-tax-return/tax-return/completing-a-tax-return/deductions-credits-expenses/lines-413-414-labour-sponsored-funds-tax-credit.html
- https://www.canada.ca/en/revenue-agency/services/tax/individuals/topics/about-your-tax-return/tax-return/completing-a-tax-return/deductions-credits-expenses/line-45700-employee-partner-gst-hst-rebate.html
- https://www.canada.ca/en/revenue-agency/services/tax/individuals/topics/about-your-tax-return/tax-return/completing-a-tax-return/deductions-credits-expenses/lines-46800-46900-eligible-educator-school-supply-tax-credit.html

CRA lines 41300 and 41400 for 2025 direct taxpayers to enter the net cost of labour-sponsored venture capital corporation shares on line 41300 and claim the federal labour-sponsored funds tax credit on line 41400. The LSVCC tax credit limit for 2025 is 15% of the lesser of $5,000, normalized as 5000, and the net cost reported on line 41300. This produces a maximum federal credit of $750.

CRA line 45700 for 2025 directs taxpayers to complete Form GST370, Employee and Partner GST/HST Rebate Application, and claim on line 45700 of the return the rebate calculated on Form GST370. Form GST370 line 15 is the total rebate claim.

CRA line 46900 for 2025 allows eligible educators to claim up to $1,000, normalized as 1000, of eligible supplies expenses. The eligible supplies amount is entered on line 46800, multiplied by 25%, normalized as 0.25, and the result is entered on line 46900.
heading: CRA 2025 Federal Other Refundable Credits
